description: Small labeled set for the A2.P1 understand=true recall-lift eval. Each query lists a few KNOWN-RELEVANT DOIs/ids that an ideal search should surface in the top-20. These are illustrative anchors, not an exhaustive gold set; recall@20 is a relative lift signal (understand off vs on), not an absolute benchmark. Update ids as the upstream corpora evolve.

queries.query: I'm looking for single-cell RNA sequencing datasets of human liver tissue
where can I find maize genome assembly data published after 2019
datasets about caffeine metabolism in Arabidopsis
ChIP-seq studies of breast cancer cell lines
small RNA sequencing in the parasitic plant Phelipanche aegyptiaca
publications on hippocampal place cells and spatial memory in mice
machine-learning training datasets of protein structures from the PDB
